summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Kinship Journeys PWA UI redesign. All requested features working perfectly: clear hero text contrast, proper navigation (Features/Pricing, no Testimonials), USD pricing with working monthly/yearly toggle, footer with 2026 copyright on all pages, and functional auth flows.
passed_tests: Landing page hero has clear text contrast (white text on dark background)
Navigation shows Features and Pricing links (no Testimonials link found)
/features page loads with all 8 key features (Family Groups, Trip Planning, Chat, Location Tracking, Budget Splitting, Document Vault, Weather, AI Assistant)
/pricing page loads with USD pricing ($4.99 monthly, $49.99 yearly)
Monthly/Yearly toggle works correctly with 'Save $10' message
Footer shows 2026 copyright on all pages
User registration flow works (email/password fields and submit button found)
Login flow works (login elements and toggle functionality present)
Happy family images relevant to travel theme
Clean layout with proper spacing and contrast
